videos.title: 협상장 호텔 사흘간 예약 불가...'우라늄 반출' 협상 난항 / YTN
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 파키스탄 호텔에서 4일간 예약을 받지 않고 있다는 것으로 나타났습니다. (Trump President announced that the hotel used as a negotiation venue in Pakistan will not accept reservations from tomorrow for four days.)
2. Trump 대통령은 이ран이 우라늄을 포기하겠다고 발언했습니다. (Trump stated that Iran would give up nuclear dust.)
3. 미국과 이ран의 핵 문제가 여전히 협상의 최대 걸림돌로 떠오르고 있다고 전했습니다. (It was reported that the nuclear issue between the U.S. and Iran remains a major obstacle in negotiations.)

videos.title: [뉴스특보] 이스라엘·레바논 휴전…미·이란 협상 재개 촉각 / 연합뉴스TV (YonhapnewsTV)
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 미국 대통령 트럼프는 2차 이란-아메리카 전쟁 협상에 자신감을 보이고 있으며, 이번 휴전을 연장할 필요가 있는지 모르나 이란이 거의 모든 것에 동의했다고 주장하고 있습니다.
2. 이스라엘과 레바논간의 충돌은 양측의 휴전에 합의하면서 일시적으로 멈추었습니다.
3. 트럼프는 2차 이란-아메리카 전쟁 협상이 가능할 것이며, 타결이 될 수도 있고, 그 결과 파키스탄으로 여행을 가질 수도 있다고 말했습니다.

videos.title: [삼성라이온즈 vs 한화이글스] 4.16(목) 야구 하이라이트｜2026 KBO 리그｜KBO X TVING
videos.subtitle_summary: 4월 16일 대전에서 진행한 KBO 리그 야구 경기, 삼성 라이온즈와 한화 이글스의 하이라이트. 박승규, 김지찬, 최영호 등 1~5번 선수들이 팀의 자부심을 높이는 강력한 투고로 적극적인 도전을 했다. 이원석과 페라자, 문현빈, 강백호, 최은성 등의 1~5번 히든카드가 제판에서 에이스카드로 변하며, 선발 투수 왕인청 선수는 마지막 카드로 경기를 무너뜨리려고 했다. 결과적으로 두 팀이 각자 강력한 타격을 보여주며 경기는 균형 있게 진행되었다.

videos.title: 삼성과 LG 1위 싸움으로 충돌? 오늘 경기 이후 순위는 어떻게 바뀌게 될 것인가? [불타는 야구팬 불팬]
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 오늘 진행되는 명품 경기에 관심이 가장 집중되고 있습니다. (현재 시점)
2. 올해 시리즈 예측을 하며, 지난 주말 시즌의 예측은 틀렸다는 것을 알려줍니다. (과거)
3. 삼성과 LG 매치업이 오늘 가장 기대가 되는 경기로 예상됩니다. (미래)

videos.title: 10 Trillion Won Loss if Samsung Union Strikes... "Know How to Be Content Sometimes" Protests Also...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics and the labor union are in a stalemate during wage negotiations for 2026, with a possible full strike next month. The union has announced a strike from the 21st to the 3rd, which could cause a loss of up to 10 trillion won to Samsung Electronics.
2. The union is demanding a 15% share of the company's profits as five performance bonuses, totaling 40.5 trillion won. This demand might seem excessive, but it's discussed in terms of current ratios, and similar bonuses are already being given to employees at TSMC and Hyundai Motor Company.
3. The union claims that over 200 employees have recently switched to Hynix Semiconductor, citing a harmonious relationship between the union and the company. There's also a study group for transitioning to Samsung Electronics' DS division, which is referred to as a "Hyundai Semiconductor Academy" in unofficial terms. Experts suggest that a long-term performance bonus system tied to corporate growth and rising stock prices would be more beneficial in the future.

videos.title: 삼성전자 충격 발표! 삼성 노조 45조 성과급 요구에 사람 다 빼고 기계 쓴다, 일자리 다 잃게 생겼다 | 경제학 | 삼성전자노조 | 삼성전자파업
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics labor union is demanding a performance-based bonus of 45 trillion won (approximately 6 billion 200 million won per employee), which exceeds the company's total research and development investment. This demand was made on April 7, 2026, when Samsung announced an unprecedented quarterly operating profit of 57 trillion 2 billion won. The union presented a bill for this amount, but the management did not accept it. In response, the union declared that they will replace human workers with robots and AI. Samsung plans to convert all semiconductor factories to robot- and AI-operated by 2030, and no one will be fired; instead, positions left vacant will not be filled again. This could affect employment opportunities for our children preparing for jobs and potentially impact national pension funds.
2. In response to the union's demands, management offered a 6.2% wage increase, special benefits, housing support, maternity leave benefits, and other incentives to prevent factory lines from stopping. However, the union rejected these offers, demanding the removal of performance-based evaluation caps and a higher wage increase. The negotiation table collapsed, and the gap between management and labor widened instead of narrowing.
3. Notably, these events coincide in a precise timing: Samsung announced its plans for transitioning all semiconductor and household appliance factories to AI self-operated factories on March 1, 2030. This announcement was made at the world's largest mobile exhibition in Barcelona, Spain. Samsung declared that it will convert all factories to AI self-operated factories by 2030. The timing of these events suggests a calculated business logic: either increase labor costs annually or invest in robots and AI now for long-term benefits. Robots do not go on strike, demand bonuses, take breaks, or have poor health conditions; they operate 24/7 without interruption. Despite the high initial investment cost, this choice is advantageous in the long run.

videos.title: "파업해도 공장 못 멈춘다" 삼성전자 가처분 신청, 노조가 점점 밀리는 진짜 이유
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics submitted a petition for court intervention to prevent the union's strike, as they are concerned about the impact on their operations and stock prices.
2. The union is demanding a performance bonus of 45 trillion won (approximately 5.8 billion USD), which is equivalent to 15% of Samsung Electronics' annual operating profit. This demand has caused controversy, with some viewing it as a blackmail tactic rather than a simple labor dispute.
3. The court intervention petition may seem alarming to some investors, but it could potentially be beneficial in the long run. Samsung Electronics faced significant challenges in the first quarter of this year, including a rise in the Middle East conflict's exchange rate and foreign selling pressure, despite recording record-high earnings. The union's demand for a massive performance bonus and threat of a general strike came at a time when the company was already struggling. Understanding the background of these events will help investors remain calm after May 21st. The union's demanded amount is 45 trillion won, which is significantly higher than the research and development funds Samsung Electronics invested last year (37.7 trillion won). This suggests that the union is asking for more money than what the company spends on securing future technology, potentially at the expense of the company's long-term growth. The negotiations between Samsung Electronics and the union broke down in just 48 hours after starting on March 25th. However, the reasons behind this breakdown are not as simple as a disagreement in positions, as there were specific cards on the table that need to be understood.

videos.title: Unprecedented Samsung Electronics Strike Imminent… "1 Trillion Won Loss Per Day" / Korea Economic...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics union has officially declared a strike next month, demanding the abolition of performance-based salary cap and 15% of mobile and home appliance business profits to be included in performance pay. The company has filed for an injunction against the union's illegal activities.
2. The union, which represents Samsung's semiconductor and mobile/home appliance divisions, has around 70,000 members out of a total of 150,000 employees at Samsung. They are unwilling to back down on their demands for the abolition of performance-based salary caps and systemic reform.
3. The union's strike could potentially cause significant losses for Samsung, especially in its semiconductor division, which is a continuous 24-hour operation. If production is halted, it could lead to substantial losses due to the need to discard workers and the time required for recovery.

videos.title: 삼성 노조 "5월 파업, 30조원 피해 예상"…볼모로 잡힌 국가 반도체 산업  / 머니투데이방송 (뉴스)
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung 노동조합은 오늘 서초 사우에서 과반 노조 지위를 획득하며, 성과급 상한을 해제하고 요구했습니다.
2. 교섭이 이루어지지 않을 경우 5월에 파업을 나선다는 계획을 밝혔으며, 파업에 따른 피해 규모가 최소 20조원에서 30조원이 될 것으로 예상됩니다.
3. Samsung 노동조합은 영업 이익의 15%를 성과급 제원으로 삼아야 한다고 밝혔으며, 올해 약 270조원의 영업 이익을 낼 경우 올해만 조원 이상의 성과급 비용이 발생할 것입니다.

videos.title: 배터리 소재 강자…포스코퓨처엠 존재감 커진다
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 전문가들이 지난 주부터 30%, 10% 등의 두 자리 수의 수익률을 보여준다고 예상하며, 오늘부터 또 우리가 수익을 낼 수 있는 기회를 찾아보겠습니다.
2. 이번 주에 소개할 종목으로 포스코 퓨처엠, 현대로템, 조선 기업, 한 달 동안 갇혀있는 로봇 기업 등이 있습니다.
3. 특히 포스코 퓨처엠과 같은 배터리 기업을 중심으로 미국의 ESS 성장세가 있어서 지금 사고 있는 것으로 보인다.
